source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Three generators are feeding a load of 100 MW. The details of the generators are shown in the <image>. In the event of increased load power demand, which of the following will happen?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Generator-1 will share more power compared to Generator-2

choice_map.A: All the generators will share equal power
choice_map.B: Generator-3 will share more power compared to Generator-1
choice_map.C: Generator-1 will share more power compared to Generator-2
choice_map.D: Generator-2 will share more power compared to Generator-3
